# A partitioning drive line splits a simple rectangle into two regions.
# Each region can have its own aisle orientation.

polygon outer
(0,0)
(300,0)
(300,200)
(0,200)
----
polygon outer 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (0,0)-(300,200), area 60000

drive-line partitions
(150,0)
(150,200)
----
drive-line (150,0) -> (150,200) partitions

generate
----
total_stalls: 98
faces: 6 (boundary: 1, interior: 5)
graph: 14 vertices, 19 edges (perimeter: 14, interior: 5)
regions: 2
